channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Says He Holds Regular Talks With Putin and Zelenskiy on Ukraine War
item.description: US President Donald Trump revealed he maintains direct communication with both Russian and Ukrainian leaders as he pushes for a settlement to the ongoing conflict. The disclosure comes amid intensified diplomatic efforts.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇰🇵 Russian Defence Minister Visits North Korea in Second High-Level Trip
item.description: Russian Defence Minister Andrei Belousov arrived in North Korea for talks, marking the second senior Russian official to visit Pyongyang in recent days. The visit underscores deepening military ties between Moscow and Pyongyang amid the Ukraine war.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu's Main Political Rivals Unite to Challenge His Coalition
item.description: Two of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's most formidable political rivals announced they are joining forces ahead of elections expected later this year, in a significant challenge to his long-standing coalition government.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦 Ukraine Marks 40th Anniversary of Chornobyl Disaster Under War Clouds
item.description: Ukraine commemorated four decades since the world's worst nuclear accident at Chornobyl, with officials warning that Russia's ongoing invasion could trigger another nuclear catastrophe.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israel Orders Evacuations of Seven Lebanese Towns After Soldier Killed
item.description: Israel issued evacuation warnings for seven towns in southern Lebanon beyond the Litani River buffer zone after a soldier was killed near the border. The move escalates tensions despite a fragile ceasefire with Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 China Yuan Settlements Hit Record High Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: China Cross-border Interbank Payment System (CIPS) reached a record single-day transaction value of 1.22 trillion yuan, with analysts saying the Middle East conflict has acted as a catalyst for rising demand in yuan settlement, particularly in oil trade.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ US Navy Secretary John Phelan Removed From Position
item.description: The Pentagon announced Navy Secretary John Phelan is departing "effective immediately" with no reason given. Former Virginia Senate candidate and special operations veteran Hung Cao will serve as acting secretary.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇪🇺 Germany Shifts Military Strategy Away From US Dependence
item.description: Germany new military doctrine emphasizes "less America, more Europe" as Berlin prepares for reduced US contributions to European security and takes greater responsibility for its own defense capabilities.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇯🇴 Two Israeli Soldiers Killed in Jordan Border Crossing Attack
item.description: Two Israeli soldiers were shot dead by a Jordanian aid truck driver near the Allenby (King Hussein) Crossing between the West Bank and Jordan. The attacker was neutralized at the site.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Japan Energy Strategy Faces Competition From China in Central Asia
item.description: Japan efforts to secure energy resources in Central Asia and Latin America are encountering significant competition from China, which has already established a strong presence in these regions through infrastructure investments and trade agreements.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦 At least 16 killed in Ukraine-Russia strikes on Chernobyl anniversary
item.description: Strikes across Ukraine, Russian-occupied Crimea, and inside Russia killed at least 16 people as the 40th anniversary of the Chernobyl nuclear disaster prompted fresh warnings about risks from attacks near nuclear facilities. Ukrainian forces struck an oil refinery deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran Ceasefire Holds as Iran Launches Tour to Revive Diplomacy
item.description: The US-Iran ceasefire remains in effect as Iran's foreign minister embarks on a diplomatic tour across the region. The conflict has entered a fragile pause with both sides signaling willingness for talks but deep differences remaining.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's Foreign Minister Makes Regional Tour Despite Trump Canceling Envoy Visit
item.description: Iran's top diplomat continues diplomatic efforts across the Middle East despite President Trump canceling a planned visit by US envoys to Pakistan for talks. The ceasefire with the US remains fragile as both sides maintain hardened positions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇲🇽 Two CIA Agents Killed in Mexico Car Crash
item.description: Two CIA agents were killed in a car crash in Mexico, with US officials confirming the incident occurred during an authorized operation. The circumstances surrounding the crash remain under investigation.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Shooter at White House Correspondents Event Identified
item.description: A shooter was identified after an incident at a White House Correspondents event. Security officials responded to the situation as investigations continue into the motives behind the attack.

item.title: 🇺🇦 At Least 8 Killed in Russian Attacks on Ukraine
item.description: At least eight people were killed and 21 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over the past day, as the war continues with no end in sight. The attacks come amid commemorations of the Chernobyl disaster anniversary.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇦🇿 Zelensky Arrives in Azerbaijan for Talks
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Azerbaijan for diplomatic talks, as Kyiv seeks to strengthen regional partnerships amid the ongoing war with Russia.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇷🇺 Germany Blames Russia for Global Cyber Campaign on Signal and WhatsApp
item.description: German authorities believe Russia is behind a global cyber campaign targeting encrypted messaging apps including Signal and WhatsApp, according to media reports. The campaign highlights growing digital threats amid geopolitical tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Southern Command Stands Up Autonomous Military Unit
item.description: US Southern Command has established a new autonomous military unit as part of broader efforts to modernize military capabilities. The move reflects growing emphasis on unmanned systems in US military strategy.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Sabotage Operations Undermine Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Talks
item.description: Hezbollah sabotage operations are undermining efforts to maintain the fragile ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon. The ongoing tensions threaten to escalate into broader conflict despite diplomatic efforts.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Mali Defence Minister Killed in al-Qaeda-Linked Attack Near Bamako
item.description: Mali's defence minister was killed in an attack by al-Qaeda-linked militants near the capital Bamako, according to RFI reports. The attack marks a major escalation in the Sahel region's ongoing insurgency.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Mali Attack: Tuareg Separatists and Jihadis Kill Dozens
item.description: An attack in Mali involving Tuareg separatists and the al-Qaeda-linked JNIM group killed dozens, including senior military officials. The violence highlights the deteriorating security situation in the Sahel.

item.title: 🇦🇺🇯🇵 Australia's Wong Visits Japan, China, South Korea for Energy Security Talks
item.description: Australia's Foreign Minister Penny Wong is visiting Japan, China, and South Korea to discuss energy security amid global supply concerns triggered by the Middle East conflict. The talks focus on ensuring stable energy supplies for the Asia-Pacific region.

item.title: 🇪🇬 Egypt Economic Outlook Trimmed Due to Iran War
item.description: Egypt's economic outlook has been trimmed slightly due to the impact of the US-Iran conflict on regional trade and energy markets. The country faces pressure from disrupted shipping routes and elevated oil prices.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇵🇰 Iran Foreign Minister Visits Pakistan Twice as Peace Talks Falter
item.description: Iran's foreign minister visited Pakistan twice in a single weekend as diplomatic efforts to salvage US-Iran peace talks continue. Pakistan has positioned itself as a potential mediator in the conflict.
